scripts.dev:web: PATH="${PWD}/frontend/.tools/node-v22.14.0-darwin-arm64/bin:$PATH" npm run db:generate && PATH="${PWD}/frontend/.tools/node-v22.14.0-darwin-arm64/bin:$PATH" npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.stop: lsof -tiTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; lsof -tiTCP:3001 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; lsof -tiTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; echo 'Stopped services on ports 3000, 3001, 8000'
scripts.build: PATH="${PWD}/frontend/.tools/node-v22.14.0-darwin-arm64/bin:$PATH" npm run db:generate && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.rag:install: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: PATH="${PWD}/frontend/.tools/node-v22.14.0-darwin-arm64/bin:$PATH" npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run rag:install
